final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: architectural-visualization
Asset type: interior design render, residential living room
Primary request: modern living room blending Nordic minimalism with Japanese wabi-sabi aesthetics
Scene/backdrop: spacious living room with large floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking blurred green vegetation outside
Subject: low-profile linen off-white fabric sofa with mixed-texture cushions, irregular natural stone coffee table with raw edges, tall fiddle-leaf fig plant, slender curved arc floor lamp, curated bookshelf with minimal books and ceramic pieces
Style/medium: photorealistic 3D architectural visualization render, realistic materials and natural lighting
Composition/framing: wide interior shot, eye-level perspective, balanced asymmetrical layout
Lighting/mood: abundant soft natural daylight from large windows, gentle and serene atmosphere, quiet and restrained zen mood
Color palette: white and light gray dominant, light white oak wood flooring, matte white walls, off-white linen, natural stone gray tones, subtle green from plants
Materials/textures: matte white painted walls, light white oak solid wood flooring with visible grain, natural linen fabric with subtle weave, rough-hewn natural stone with organic edges, ceramic matte glaze, fiddle-leaf fig glossy leaves
Constraints: follow wabi-sabi and decluttering principles, keep furniture low-profile and minimal, preserve the quiet zen atmosphere
Avoid: cluttered spaces, bright saturated colors, glossy reflective surfaces, artificial harsh lighting, decorative excess
